result.summary: 12andus.com appears to expose no public developer API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI; only the public website and authenticated account-based purchase/user flows are evident.

12andus_account.label: 12andus user account
12andus_account.setup: Create an account on [12andus Register](https://12andus.com/register/) using email/password, or sign in with Google from the same page. This is the credential used for authenticated user features and purchases; keep the account email/password or Google-linked login available for the site.
